features.title: Branded invoices
features.desc: Add your logo, colours and terms. Every invoice looks professional and prints clean.

features.title: Any currency
features.desc: Invoice in USD, EUR, GBP, INR, AED, SAR, OMR and more, with correct decimals.

features.title: VAT and tax ready
features.desc: Apply any VAT, GST or sales-tax rate. Tax is calculated on the net, after discounts.

features.desc: Polite payment reminders go out automatically until the invoice is paid.

sections.title: What is an invoice?
sections.body: An invoice is a commercial document a seller issues to a buyer requesting payment for goods or services delivered. It lists the items, quantities, unit prices, taxes and the total amount due, along with payment terms and a due date. A clear, numbered invoice is the legal record of a sale and the trigger for your customer to pay you.

sections.title: From draft to paid in minutes
sections.body: Build the invoice from a quotation or from scratch, send it, and let Paper & Pen handle the rest. Payments, reminders and your books stay in sync automatically.
items: Create from a saved client and product list, or start blank
Set your currency, tax rate and payment terms
Send by WhatsApp or email with a pay-online link
Track status: draft, sent, partially paid, paid, overdue
Record manual payments or let online payments reconcile themselves

sections.title: Local strengths, global reach
sections.body: Paper & Pen works for businesses anywhere. If you are in the GCC you get Arabic invoices, native OMR, AED and SAR formatting, 5% VAT presets and Paymob card payments out of the box. Everywhere else you simply pick your currency, your tax rate and your language.

faqs.a: Yes. Creating, sending and tracking invoices is free forever on Paper & Pen. You only pay if you add optional modules like Inventory, HR or Accounting.

faqs.q: Can I invoice in any currency?
faqs.a: Yes. Choose any currency, including USD, EUR, GBP, INR, AED, SAR and OMR. Decimal places adjust automatically (for example three decimals for OMR).

faqs.q: Does it handle VAT or GST?
faqs.a: Yes. Set any tax rate per invoice or per line. GCC users get a 5% VAT preset, and the tax is always calculated on the amount after discounts.
Send the invoice with a pay-online link and clients can pay by card or a local method in one tap. You can also record cash, bank transfer or cheque payments manually.

faqs.q: Can I send invoices over WhatsApp?
faqs.a: Yes. Share the invoice as a link or PDF straight to WhatsApp, or send it by email. Both keep the pay-online button so you get paid faster.

ctaTitle: Send your first invoice in minutes
ctaSub: Create a free Paper & Pen workspace, add your logo, and send a professional invoice that gets paid online.
